title: Allantodia procera
taxonomy: Allantodia procera is classified within the family Athyriaceae, which is a group of ferns commonly known as the lady ferns or marsh ferns. This classification places Allantodia procera in the division Pteridophyta, which includes all vascular plants that produce spores instead of seeds. The family Athyriaceae is further divided into several genera, with Allantodia procera being one of the species within this group. The classification of Allantodia procera is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other species in the same family.
